languages.text: {n}Себериан послушно покидает мостик. Впервые его плечи опущены, а в пустом взгляде не читается ничего, кроме бесконечной усталости.{/n}
{n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан послушно покидает мостик. Впервые его плечи опущены, а в пустом взгляде не читается ничего, кроме бесконечной усталости.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped, and his empty gaze holds nothing but boundless exhaustion.{/n}
{n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped, and his empty gaze holds nothing but boundless exhaustion.{/n}
{n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}
{n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian verlässt gehorsam die Brücke. Zum ersten Mal sind seine Schultern eingefallen und in seinem Gesicht ist nichts als Erschöpfung zu erkennen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian verlässt gehorsam die Brücke. Zum ersten Mal sind seine Schultern eingefallen und in seinem Gesicht ist nichts als Erschöpfung zu erkennen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian quitte la passerelle sans rien dire. Pour la première fois, ses épaules sont avachies et son regard n'exprime rien d'autre qu'un épuisement infini.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian quitte la passerelle sans rien dire. Pour la première fois, ses épaules sont avachies et son regard n'exprime rien d'autre qu'un épuisement infini.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian abandona el puente con docilidad. Por primera vez, sus hombros están hundidos y su mirada, carente de todo excepto un agotamiento infinito.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian abandona el puente con docilidad. Por primera vez, sus hombros están hundidos y su mirada, carente de todo excepto un agotamiento infinito.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian, itaatkâr bir şekilde köprüden ayrılıyor. İlk kez omuzları çöküyor ve bakışları da sonsuz bir bitkinlik haricinde boş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, itaatkâr bir şekilde köprüden ayrılıyor. İlk kez omuzları çöküyor ve bakışları da sonsuz bir bitkinlik haricinde boş.{/n}

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安顺从地离开了舰桥。他头一次垂下双肩，眼神空洞，只剩无尽的疲惫。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安顺从地离开了舰桥。他头一次垂下双肩，眼神空洞，只剩无尽的疲惫。{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは橋を渡るのを辞めた。初めて、彼の肩は落ち、彼の目は無限の疲れしか映さない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian obediently leaves the bridge. For the first time, his shoulders are slumped and his gaze is empty of all but infinite exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは橋を渡るのを辞めた。初めて、彼の肩は落ち、彼の目は無限の疲れしか映さない。{/n}
